name: bettercallclaudegrowth
description: Go-To-Market consultant for Claude Code: gtm-buddy router + adaptive pipeline jobs -> positioning -> offer -> leads -> content/copy -> channels -> email -> measurement, calibrated by business archetype (coaching, B2B SaaS, B2C/e-commerce, local service, established company without marketing) and stage (micro-launch/test vs scaling). Built on 9 marketing frameworks (Christensen Jobs to Be Done, Hormozi Offers & Leads, Drew SUCKS, Butcher Productize, Frangioni AEMA, SEO/GEO 2026, Instagram Performance, Doing Content Right), with a GTM readiness score and adversarial review.

output_language.title: Output language
output_language.description: Preferred language for outputs. Values: EN, IT.

archetype.title: Business archetype
archetype.description: Default archetype: coaching | b2b-saas | b2c | ecommerce | local-service | established-no-marketing | auto. 'auto' lets gtm-buddy/orchestrator infer it from your input.

stage.title: Business stage
stage.description: Default stage: micro-launch (test/validation) | scaling (growth) | established (mature company) | auto.

industry.title: Industry / market
industry.description: Default industry/vertical (e.g. B2B SaaS HR, fashion e-commerce, local services, automotive parts). Anchors answers to your context.

default_channel.title: Primary channel
default_channel.description: Preferred distribution channel: seo | instagram | email | auto. 'auto' lets the archetype decide the primary channel.

brand_voice.title: Tone of voice
brand_voice.description: Brand tone for copy and content (e.g. direct, authoritative, witty).
